title: What do you think of our new features?

posts.author: Sapphire1 (Sapphire)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sapphire from monday.com here!
We’re doing research on future features and we are curious to hear your thoughts!

Please take a few minutes to fill out this survey, so we can make monday.com work better for you and your team.

Take the survey

Your answers are anonymous and will be used to improve the monday.com experience

posts.author: Andrews5683 (Andrews5683)
posts.cookedHtml: Apart from these, you should also segment your audience to make sure that announcements go out to only those who actually need them without disturbing other audiences. A good feature announcement clearly shows the benefit to the reader, has a clear CTA, and uses various forms of content like gifs and videos.
